prompt: What do you think about bands and chains for building absolute strength? The logic sounds good—do they actually work?
assertions: Explains the rationale for accommodating resistance (matching the force/strength curve)
Provides a concrete example (e.g., lighter at bottom, heavier near lockout)
Cites research or meta-analytic evidence showing little to no clear advantage over conventional loading
Concludes bands/chains are fine as variation tools but not reliably superior for maximal strength
